arts.ttl: Man United eye-up Ajax wonderkid dubbed 'the next Jude Bellingham' - as Red Devils get set to target young stars with high potential this summer
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Manchester United are limited budget wise to what they can do at first team level this summer with a lot depending on who they can sell.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher has already predicted Newcastle United's Champions League fate with Chelsea shock
arts.sum: The success of English sides in Europe means the top five top-flight sides will qualify for the Champions League, with United battling it out with Nottingham Forest, Chelsea, Man City and Aston Villa. "Looking at the fixtures and Newcastle have a game in hand, I think Nottingham Forest will just do it, I think Chelsea will miss out as they have the toughest fixtures," Carragher told Sky Sports before this weekend's fixtures.

arts.ttl: Man United star has already told Ruben Amorim what he wants to hear amid Andre Onana doubts
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and rumours as Andre Onana continues to struggle for form amid reports he could be dropped for the Premier League clash with Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha hits out at backlash after transfer 'message' amid Newcastle United interest
arts.sum: On Saturday, an Instagram account by the name Talking Wolves shared a post alleging that Cunha had posted and then deleted a story on the platform saying: "Time to be happy. In that time, he has scored 31 goals in 85 appearances across all competitions and his performances have caught the attention of clubs across the Premier League .

arts.ttl: St James' will show Eddie Howe love but Newcastle stars know what they must do
arts.sum: He had missed the pre-match press conference on Friday, with assistant head coach Jason Tindall filling in, and was expected to have recovered in time to take his place on the touchline against Man United. Eddie Howe should not be in any doubt over the place he holds in the hearts of Newcastle United supporters.

arts.ttl: 12 players who could miss Newcastle's Premier League clash with Manchester United
arts.sum: Both Newcastle and Manchester United will head into Sunday's Premier League showdown without some key players as Eddie Howe and Ruben Amorim assess their squads for the big game. Former Sunderland loanee Amad has been a big miss for Man United, and the winger is not expected to feature befor next season after picking up an ankle injury.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe in hospital but conscious and talking with family, Newcastle say
arts.sum: 47-year-old had been feeling unwell ‘for a number of days’ Howe admitted on Friday and is receiving expert care Eddie Howe, the Newcastle head coach, was admitted to hospital on Friday and will miss Sunday’s game with Manchester United as a result. The Carabao Cup winners said the 47-year-old had been feeling unwell “for a number of days” and would not be at St James’ Park on Sunday. A statement added that Howe was “conscious, talking with family and continuing to receive expert medical care”. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe taken to hospital
arts.sum: Newcastle United have confirmed that Eddie Howe has been admitted to hospital and will miss Sunday's Premier League clash with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Newcastle manager Eddie Howe hospitalised and will miss Manchester United game
arts.sum: The manager has been struck down with an unspecified illness

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe admitted to hospital and will miss Newcastle vs Man United clash
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news with Newcastle boss Eddie Howe set to be absent for their Premier League clash
